message:
fix(test): preserve real exports in useTokenUsage test constants mock (#6124)

The test mocked '../../lib/constants' and '../../lib/constants/network'
with factory returns that only included the specific constants the test
wanted to override. Because the constants barrel re-exports from network
and other sub-modules via 'export *', and because downstream modules
(analytics -> demoMode, api, tokenUsageApi) import other constants like
STORAGE_KEY_DEMO_MODE and MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS through the same barrel,
the mocks broke module load with:

  No "STORAGE_KEY_DEMO_MODE" export is defined on the
  "../../lib/constants" mock

Switch both mocks to the importOriginal form so the real exports are
preserved and only the intended values are overridden. This is
drift-proof against future additions to the constants barrel.

Fixes #6115

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
